title: Hide Armor - Hypixel SkyBlock Gadget
description: This mod allows you to see players' skins instead of those formulaic armors and head helmets.
body: Tired of those skyblock's formulaic armors and player head helmets? This mod hides those armors by default and allows you to see players' skins! You can also press "Alt" to check out player's armor temporarily for gear requirements.
